request.description: Adds two integers. This is a test WebService. ©DNE Online

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soap12:Envelope xmlns:soap12="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope">
  <soap12:Body>
    <tns:Multiply xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/">
      <tns:intA>99.2</tns:intA>                     // fractional input
      <tns:intB>11.1</tns:intB>                     // fractional input
    </tns:Multiply>
  </soap12:Body>
</soap12:Envelope>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soap12:Envelope xmlns:soap12="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope">
  <soap12:Body>
    <tns:Divide xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/">
      <tns:intA>12345678901234567890</tns:intA>         // input is beyond int range
      <tns:intB>09876543210987654321</tns:intB>         // input is beyond int range
    </tns:Divide>
  </soap12:Body>
</soap12:Envelope>
